title: Friday Wine Tasting
description: Stop by between 5pm and 8pm. Let us introduce you to wines worth talking about.

title: Baile Folklórico
description: Join us for our beginner baile folklórico classes. All ages welcome. Run by 34th Avenue Open Streets Coalition

title: Clases de tejido / Crochet Classes
description: Ven a relajarte con nosotros mientras aprendes a tejer. Esta clase es para todos los niveles, materiales incluidos. Actividad 100% familiar. Todos son bienvenidos!! Come relax with us while you learn to knit. This class is for all levels, materials included. 100% family activity. Everyone is welcome!! Run by 34th Avenue Open Streets Coalition

title: First Rule of Fire with Rebecca Gopoian Book Launch
description: Join us to celebrate the debut of local author Rebecca Gopoian: First Rule of Fire Each ticket includes either a copy of the featured book or a $5 WBB Gift Card Copies of the books will be available for purchase at the event. (while supplies last) A signing will follow the talk. $5 Just a Seat […]

title: Uke Hut Open Mic
address: 36-01 36th Ave, Long Island City, NY 11106, USA
description: Ukulele & MORE! Bring any instrument and/or your own voice. No need to sign up in advance. Just show up a bit early, throw $10 into the broken ukulele, write your name on the notebook, have free drinks and chill! See you all there!!

title: The Trojan Women by Euripides
address: 45-50 Van Dam St, Long Island City, NY 11101, USA
description: LaGuardia Performing Arts Center, in collaboration with Eclipses Group Theater NY, presents The Trojan Women, Euripides’ searing anti-war tragedy. Featuring a multicultural cast of professional actors, live music, and a new English translation by co-artistic director Demetri Bonaros, this large-scale production brings fresh urgency to an ancient classic. Set in the aftermath of Troy’s fall, […]

title: Samuel Torres Sextet | Contemporary Latin Jazz
description: This sextet, led by percussionist and composer Samuel Torres, is a renowned ensemble known for blending Afro-Latin rhythms, Latin jazz, and contemporary classical music. Their explosive performances and collaborations have earned them a Latin Grammy. Don’t miss this dynamic musical experience! Time: 7:30 pm – 8:30 pm (First Set) 9:30 pm – 10:30 pm (Second […]

title: Grove Comedy Live!
description: Grove Comedy returns with a curated lineup of big names, original performances and up and coming all stars. Ticket: $16.33 General Admission Seating is first come, first serve. Doors typically open 15 mins prior to showtime.
